session.user:
Run the following commands and report results:
1. ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py 2. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py
Report any errors or confirm all clean.
session.assistant: I'll run these type checking and linting commands for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py
Run type checking on land command files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py
Run linting checks on land command files

session.assistant:
Great! Both checks passed successfully:
**ty (type checking)**: All checks passed!
**ruff (linting)**: All checks passed!
All three files are clean: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_pipeline.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py`
